auto_code.ai_prompt_placeholder:
Free to use now.
Try copying an image and press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V).
Describe your table and let AI help.
Get your AI-Path from the plugin market profile, put it into config.yaml (autocode -> ai-path), then restart the project.
Press Ctrl+Enter (or Cmd+Enter) to generate.

auto_code.abbreviation_tooltip: Used as request object name and route group.
auto_code.use_gva_model_tooltip: Note: Automatically embeds global.Model fields (primary key and soft delete).
auto_code.create_btn_auth_tooltip: Note: Generates page button-permission config. If you don't assign buttons in role management, they won't be visible.
auto_code.auto_create_api_tooltip: Note: Register generated APIs into the database.
auto_code.auto_create_menu_tooltip: Note: Register generated menus into the database.
auto_code.auto_migrate_tooltip: Note: Auto-migrate database table structure. Disable if not needed.
auto_code.add_resource_markers_tooltip: Note: Adds created_by/updated_by/deleted_by for resource access control.
auto_code.base_template_tooltip: Note: Base template generates no structs or CRUD. It only configures properties like enter to support custom non-CRUD logic.
auto_code.tree_structure_tooltip: Note: Creates parentID for parent/child relations. Only supports int primary keys.

skills.sync_prompt_content: Sync to other AI client tools?

skills.login_required_content: Please log in to the plugin market before downloading. Go to login now?
skills.dev_only_warning: Development-only feature for building the in-project skills library.
skills.rule_name: Name: use lowercase + kebab-case as the skill directory and /slash command.
skills.rule_description: Description: include triggers and keywords (used for auto-matching).
skills.rule_content: Content: organize by Instructions / Examples / Guidelines, and specify inputs/outputs/constraints.
skills.rule_templates: For templates/specs/scripts, reference templates/... , references/... , scripts/... in the markdown.
skills.name: Name
skills.name_tip: Recommended: 2-4 words, no spaces, ASCII only.
skills.description_tooltip: Describe when to use it + triggers + keywords. This is the most important line.
skills.description_placeholder: e.g. Add bilingual comments for code review/refactor/readability
skills.allowed_tools_tooltip: Limit tool scope, e.g. Bash(gh *), Read, Write
skills.optional_remove_tip: Optional. If empty, it will be removed on save.
skills.context_tooltip: fork = isolated context, suitable for complex tasks
skills.agent_tooltip: When context=fork, you can set a sub-agent, e.g. Explore
skills.markdown_tooltip: Keep it concise; put heavy details in templates/references/scripts.
skills.markdown_tip: Keep markdown short; put details in templates/references/scripts and reference them by relative paths.
skills.scripts_desc: Put executable logic / validation here. Reference scripts/filename in markdown (requires code execution enabled).
skills.resources_desc: Put background info or glossary here. Reference resources/filename in markdown.
skills.references_desc: Put standards/rules here. Reference references/filename in markdown.
skills.templates_desc: Put output structure / code skeleton here. Reference templates/filename in markdown.
skills.skill_description_placeholder: e.g. Improve code comments & readability for review/refactor
skills.description_tip2: Be specific about triggers and keywords.
skills.script_ext_tip: No extension needed; it will be added automatically.
skills.download_hint: You can download to one AI tool, or choose "All tools".
skills.markdown_placeholder:
Suggested structure: # Skill Title -> ## Instructions -> ## Examples -> ## Guidelines.
Reference templates/... , references/... , scripts/... in markdown when needed.

Example:
# Code Comment Expert
## Instructions
- Describe goal, inputs, outputs, steps.

## Examples
- Input: ...
- Output: ...

## Guidelines
- Constraints, format, quality bar.
skills.msg_delete_skill_confirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This will also delete its scripts/resources/references/templates files.
skills.msg_sync_to_other_tools: Sync to other AI client tools?
skills.msg_login_plugin_market: Please log in to the plugin market before downloading. Go to login now?

export_template.range_tip: Range is start date (inclusive) to end date (exclusive).
export_template.business_db_tooltip: Note: configure multiple databases in db-list first. Restart the service after configuration. If you cannot select, set disabled:false in config.yaml to choose the target DB.
export_template.ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe the export you want. Select the business DB first; if not selected, the default GVA DB will be used.
export_template.template_key_placeholder: This key is used by frontend components to reference the template
export_template.export_sql_placeholder: Enter export SQL. Supports GORM named params, e.g. SELECT * FROM sys_apis WHERE id = @id
export_template.import_sql_placeholder: Enter import SQL. Supports GORM named params, e.g. INSERT INTO sys_apis (path, description, api_group, method) VALUES (@path, @description, @api_group, @method). Param names must match keys in template info.
export_template.custom_conditions_note: In this mode, conditions must be passed as condition = {key1:"value1", key2:"value2"}. Keys must match the @key placeholders in your SQL.
export_template.start_before_end: Start date must be earlier than end date
export_template.msg_select_tables: Please select the tables to export
export_template.msg_select_db_table: Please select a business DB and table before continuing
export_template.msg_ai_autofill_failed: AI auto-fill failed; switched to manual mode
export_template.msg_invalid_template_info: Invalid template info format. Please check.
export_template.template_placeholder:
Template info format:
- Key: database column name (for JOIN mode use table.column)
- Value: Excel column header

If the key is a DB keyword/function, handle it accordingly (MySQL examples):
{
  "table_column1": "Column 1",
  "table_column3": "Column 3",
  "table_column4": "Column 4",
  "`rows`": "DB keyword/function example"
}

SQL mode:
- Use the alias key from your SQL. Example: "xxx as k1" -> {"k1":"Header name"}

JOIN export:
- Keys should be like: {table_name1.table_column1:"Column 1", table_name2.table_column2:"Column 2"}
- If column names are duplicated, use aliases:
  {table_name1.table_column1 as key:"Column 1", table_name2.table_column2 as key2:"Column 2"}

Import is not supported in JOIN mode.
